name: MSI MAG B660 TOMAHAWK WIFI ATX Motherboard - Socket LGA 1700 - Supports DDR5-6200+(OC) - Intel B660 Chipset - 1x PCIe 4.0 x16 - 3x M.2 Slots - USB 3.2 Gen2x2 Type-C - DisplayPort 1.4 - HDMI 2.1 - Realtek 2.5G LAN - Intel Wi-Fi 6E - BT 5.2 (B660TOMWI)
shortName: MSI MAG B660 TOMAHAWK WIFI ATX Motherboard - Socket LGA 1700
description: MSI MAG B660 ATX motherboard with DDR5 support and WiFi 6E for mid-range gaming builds.
